author_evidence: The source page at https://mcbuild.org/schematics/16786:a-small-modern-house identifies 'Designed by: Rizzial', 'Schematic by: Alterio', and publishes the item by Alterio.
license_evidence: McBuild Terms & Conditions, updated 2026-06-28, sections 4-5 at https://mcbuild.org/posts/terms allow personal non-commercial use but prohibit, without prior written permission, automated collection, corpus construction, and use of service content or data to develop, train, fine-tune, evaluate, or improve AI/ML models, systems, or datasets.
notes: Human-confirmed fail-closed research-only outcome. The source preview's primary facade matches the normalized min-Z projection, so canonical front is north. Current extraction retains hard semantic blockers; no source-supported sparse corrections were approved.

author_evidence: The source page at https://mcbuild.org/schematics/11323:lakehouse publishes the item 'By admin' but does not identify the original designer or schematic creator.
license_evidence: McBuild Terms & Conditions, updated 2026-06-28, sections 4-5 at https://mcbuild.org/posts/terms allow personal non-commercial use but prohibit, without prior written permission, automated collection, corpus construction, and use of service content or data to develop, train, fine-tune, evaluate, or improve AI/ML models, systems, or datasets.
notes: Human-confirmed fail-closed research-only outcome. The source facade with the tree on the left, chimney on the right, and lower entrance matches the normalized min-Z projection, so canonical front is north. Extraction retains missing circulation, entrance, floor continuity, and roof blockers; 1,787 vertical-circulation cells span most of the normalized volume and 601 overlap roof cells, requiring broad relabeling rather than sparse corrections.

author_evidence: The source page at https://mcbuild.org/schematics/18505:tavern publishes the item 'By fiavando' but does not separately establish the original designer or schematic creator.
license_evidence: McBuild Terms & Conditions, updated 2026-06-28, sections 4-5 at https://mcbuild.org/posts/terms allow personal non-commercial use but prohibit, without prior written permission, automated collection, corpus construction, and use of service content or data to develop, train, fine-tune, evaluate, or improve AI/ML models, systems, or datasets.
notes: Human-confirmed fail-closed research-only outcome. The source's dedicated front facade with centered double doors, symmetric timber posts, and main gable matches the raw +X / normalized east projection, so canonical front is east. Extraction sparsely scales 17x17x20 source samples into 64^3: all 515 vertical-circulation cells are disconnected singletons, 224 overlap roof, and circulation count is zero. Broad relabeling or extractor changes rather than sparse corrections are required.
